en_title: Rayman Legends Retold Reimagines Ubisoft's Classic Platformer With 3D Visuals
cn_title: 《育碧》《雷曼：传奇》重制版公布，3D画面焕新经典
subtitle: 经典重启
opus_summary: 育碧在PlayStation State of Play直播中正式公布《雷曼：传奇》重制版《Rayman Legends Retold》，采用3D画面重制原版横版关卡并新增3D玩法段落。游戏将于10月1日登陆PC、PS5、Nintendo Switch 2和Xbox Series，售价39.99美元(约合人民币286元)。音乐关卡回归，新增四个关卡，Kung Foot足球小游戏也加入新道具。育碧蒙彼利埃工作室再次操刀，雷曼系列有望借此重焕生机。

paragraphs.en: Rayman Legends Retold has now been officially announced by Ubisoft following earlier leaks.
paragraphs.cn: 继此前泄露后，育碧现已正式公布《雷曼：传奇》重制版《Rayman Legends Retold》。

paragraphs.en: The souped-up platforming remake has been completely remade with 3D visuals for its original sidescrolling sections, plus all-new 3D gameplay segments, as glimpsed in a reveal trailer shown during today's big PlayStation State of Play broadcast.
paragraphs.cn: 这款强化版平台跳跃重制作品将原版横版卷轴关卡完全以3D画面重制，并加入了全新的3D玩法段落——在今日PlayStation State of Play直播中公布的预告片里可窥一斑。

paragraphs.en: Rayman Legends Retold will launch on October 1 for PC, PlayStation 5, Nintendo Switch 2 and Xbox Series X/S, and is priced at $39.99.
paragraphs.cn: 《Rayman Legends Retold》将于10月1日登陆PC、PlayStation 5、Nintendo Switch 2和Xbox Series X/S，售价39.99美元(约合人民币286元)。

paragraphs.en: Today's trailer also offered a glimpse at the game's reimagined story, which also features voiced cutscenes. Musical levels will also return, though the four new ones mentioned by Ubisoft in a press release sound like they'll be different from the original (Black Betty level RIP). On the upside, the game's compulsive Kung Foot soccer minigame is also back with new power-ups.
paragraphs.cn: 今日的预告片还展示了游戏重新构思的故事，并加入了配音过场动画。音乐关卡也将回归，不过育碧在新闻稿中提到的四个新关卡听起来与原版有所不同（Black Betty关卡安息吧）。好消息是，令人上瘾的Kung Foot足球小游戏也回来了，并加入了新道具。

paragraphs.en: "Rayman Legends Retold is our way of revisiting what makes Rayman so special, and re‑telling that experience for a new generation of players," said Ubisoft brand producer Loïc Gounon. "We wanted to preserve everything fans love, and Legends gave us the perfect foundation to expand Rayman's lore, its world logic, and how everything connects together."
paragraphs.cn: 「《Rayman Legends Retold》是我们重新审视雷曼独特魅力、并为新一代玩家重新讲述这段体验的方式，」育碧品牌制作人Loïc Gounon表示，「我们希望保留粉丝喜爱的一切，而《雷曼：传奇》为我们扩展雷曼的世界观、世界逻辑以及一切如何相互关联提供了完美基础。」

paragraphs.en: Rayman Legends is one of the best sidescrolling platformers to not feature Mario, and it's clear Ubisoft is keen to give it a new lease of life. Previous leaks revealed planned crossovers with characters from Astro Bot and Clair Obscur: Expedition 33. Contrary to previous rumors, however, multiplayer will remain local-only, rather than online.
paragraphs.cn: 《雷曼：传奇》是不含任天堂马力欧的最佳横版卷轴平台跳跃游戏之一，显然育碧渴望为其注入新生命。此前的泄露显示，游戏计划与《宇宙机器人》和《光与影：33号远征队》的角色进行联动。然而与之前的传闻相反，多人模式将仅限本地，而非在线。

paragraphs.en: The project has once again been worked on by Ubisoft Montpellier, the location previously headed up by Rayman creator Michel Ancel, before he quit the company to go work in a wildlife park.
paragraphs.cn: 该项目再次由育碧蒙彼利埃工作室操刀，该工作室此前由雷曼创始人Michel Ancel领导，之后他离开公司去了一家野生动物园工作。

paragraphs.en: Ubisoft is seemingly keen to revive the fortunes of its platforming mascot after years in the wilderness. Earlier this year saw the launch of Rayman: 30th Anniversary Edition, and there's talk of an all-new Rayman project in the works for the future ( which Ancel himself has consulted on ). Exactly when that will materialize is unknown, but another chance to play Legends and all of its new content will certainly keep us busy.
paragraphs.cn: 在沉寂多年后，育碧显然渴望重振其平台跳跃吉祥物的命运。今年早些时候推出了《雷曼：30周年纪念版》，而且有消息称未来还有一款全新的雷曼项目正在开发中（Ancel本人也参与了咨询）。具体何时问世尚不得而知，但再次体验《雷曼：传奇》及其所有新内容的机会无疑会让我们忙上一阵。

paragraphs.en: For more from tonight's show, here's everything announced at State of Play June 2026 if you need a catch up on what PlayStation has in store.
paragraphs.cn: 想了解更多今晚发布会的内容，请查看2026年6月State of Play的全部公告，了解PlayStation的储备阵容。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN新闻编辑。可通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或在Bluesky上找到他。
